dct_title_s: New York City TLC Taxi Zones, 2026
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Taxi and Limousine Commission
dct_description_sm: New York City TLC Taxi Zones, 2026 is a polygon theme representing Taxi and Limousine Commission (TLC) taxi zones New York City as of March 2026. The TLC use these zones to track and aggregate trip data, and the originating and destination zones are included in the reported trip data from the TLC website and NYC Open Data. This dataset was downloaded from the TLC website at : https://www.nyc.gov/site/tlc/about/tlc-trip-record-data.page in March 2026. Columbia Libraries staff converted the data to the geopackage format.
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Taxi and Limousine Commission
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Taxi and Limousine Commission
